zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Brus於大約1229年出生在英國越可爾斯凱爾頓時，她的父親Sir Peter de Brus II41歲，母親Helewisa de Lancaster27歲。她於1243年11月與Lord Walter de Fauconberge在英國越可爾利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1286年5月22日在英國越可爾吉斯波洛享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾吉斯波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes de Brus于大约1229年出生在英国越可爾斯凱爾頓时，她的父亲Sir Peter de Brus II41岁，母亲Helewisa de Lancaster27岁。她于1243年11月与Lord Walter de Fauconberge在英国越可爾利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1286年5月22日在英国越可爾吉斯波洛享年58岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾吉斯波洛。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Brus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Polish, Slovenian, Czech, Sorbian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): from Slavic brus ‘whetstone’, presumably a metonymic occupational name for someone who honed or sharpened blades; possibly also a nickname for a clumsy or coarse fellow. Compare Bruss .
Slovenian: from an old dialect short form of the personal name Ambrož (see Ambrose ). Compare Bruss .
French: topographic name for someone living on a heath, from Occitan brusc ‘heather’, or a habitational name from (Le/Les) Brus, the name of several places in southern France.

variants.name: Bruss
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Eldor, Reinhard, Rudie, Wilhelm.
German (also Brüss): from a short form of the medieval personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ).
Americanized or Germanized form of Polish, Slovenian, Czech, Sorbian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic)   Brus  , meaning ‘whetstone’ and, as a Slovenian name, also ‘Ambrose’.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Brus was born about 1229, in Skelton, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Peter de Brus II, was 41 and her mother, Helewisa de Lancaster, was 27. She married Lord Walter de Fauconberge in November 1243, in Rise, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 22 May 1286, in Guisborough, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in Guisborough, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Brus est née environ 1229, à Skelton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Peter de Brus II, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Helewisa de Lancaster, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Lord Walter de Fauconberge en novembre 1243, à Rise, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 22 mai 1286, à Guisborough, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Guisborough, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes de Brus um 1229 in Skelton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Peter de Brus II 41 und ihre Mutter Helewisa de Lancaster 27. Sie hat im November 1243 in Rise, Yorkshire, England Lord Walter de Fauconberge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 22. Mai 1286 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Guisborough, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Guisborough, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Brus è nata il circa 1229 nel Skelton, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir Peter de Brus II, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Helewisa de Lancaster, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Lord Walter de Fauconberge nel novembre 1243, nel Rise, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 22 maggio 1286, nel Guisborough, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a Guisborough, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Brusが約1229年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスケルトンで生まれた時，父Sir Peter de Brus IIは41歳，母Helewisa de Lancasterは27歳であった。1243年11月にイギリスヨークシュアイアリゼでLord Walter de Fauconbergeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1286年5月22日にイギリスヨークシュアイアグイスボロウで58歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアグイスボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Brus(이)가 대략 1229년 영국 요르크실르 스켈턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Peter de Brus II(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helewisa de Lancaster(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1243년 11월 영국 요르크실르 리스에서 Lord Walter de Fauconberge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1286년 5월 22일 영국 요르크실르 길스버루에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 길스버루에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Brus nasceu aproximadamente 1229, em Skelton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Peter de Brus II, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Helewisa de Lancaster, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord Walter de Fauconberge em novembro de 1243, em Rise, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 22 de maio de 1286, em Guisborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em Guisborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Brus родилась около 1229 г. в местности скелтон, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Peter de Brus II было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Helewisa de Lancaster, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Walter de Fauconberge ноябрь 1243 г. в местности рис, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 22 мая 1286 г. в местности гуисбороую, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности гуисбороую, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes de Brus nació aproximadamente 1229, en Skelton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Peter de Brus II, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Helewisa de Lancaster, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Lord Walter de Fauconberge en noviembre de 1243, en Rise, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 22 de mayo de 1286, en Guisborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en Guisborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
